equivalents_en: this is a voiced bilabial fricative (or occasionally approximant) pronounced

senses.definition_en: this is a voiced bilabial fricative (or occasionally approximant) pronounced
senses.definition_dg: Sauti ya Chidigo ambayo inatamkwa kpwa midomo miiri bila kupiga phepho kali. Ni tafauti na 'p' ya Chiswahili.

examples.en: The sound 'ph' is a voiced bilabial fricative in Digo.
examples.sw: Sauti 'ph' ni sauti maalum ya Kidigo.

sub_entries.definition_en: the lips close together and letting them vibrate
sub_entries.definition_sw: this sound often corresponds to p in Swahili (e.g

senses.definition_dg: Kumuherera mutu chitu.

examples.en: I will give Bakari his money

senses.definition_dg: Kupokera au kupata chitu.

examples.dg: Waphaha zawadi nono kula kpwa mwalimu.
examples.en: He received a nice gift from the teacher.
examples.sw: Alipata zawadi nzuri kutoka kwa mwalimu.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu fulani ambapho chitu chinapatikana au mutu anahala.

examples.en: This place is very good.

senses.definition_dg: Kukubaliana na mutu kuhusu jambo.

examples.dg: Mwishowe aphahana na kuisha kpwa malumbano.
examples.en: Finally they agreed and the argument ended.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa kutsama kpwa neno au kuandza mambo ganjina. Basi.

examples.en: So, let's go now.

equivalents_sw: kupaka; kuweka alama kwa mfano unapotaka kujenga nyumba

senses.definition_en: to demarcate an area, to survey, e.g. to mark the dimensions of a house on the ground before digging the foundation, to indicate a boundary
senses.definition_sw: kupaka; kuweka alama kwa mfano unapotaka kujenga nyumba
senses.definition_dg: Kuika alama kpwa phatu kuonyesha mpaka au mfumo wa nyumba kabla ya kuandza kudzenga.

examples.dg: Aphaka phatu pha nyumba kabla ya kuchimba msingi.
examples.en: They demarcated the house area before digging the foundation.
examples.sw: Walipaka alama ya nyumba kabla ya kuchimba msingi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphangusa na kuusa uchafu kpwa mkono.

examples.en: Wipe away the tears and don't cry anymore.

equivalents_en: grab at (often implied that the object was missed)

senses.definition_en: to grab at (often implied that the object was missed)
senses.definition_dg: Kujaribu kugbwira chitu kpwa haraka ela ukakichesa.

examples.en: He grabbed at the ball but missed it.

equivalents_en: part of the coconut palm where the palm wine is tapped from

senses.definition_en: part of the coconut palm where the palm wine is tapped from, the florescence of coconut flowers covering the young coconuts
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mnazi ambayo tembo inatoka, inayofunika nazi ndide.

examples.dg: Mgema anakota tembo kula kpwa phalanga ya mnazi.
examples.en: The tapper collects palm wine from the coconut florescence.
examples.sw: Mgema anakusanya pombe kutoka paanga ya mnazi.

senses.definition_sw: medium sized, ground dwelling lizard with a reddish head, green or blue body and blue tail; aina ya mjusi
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mjusi wa kahi-kahi ambaye ana chitswa cha kundu na mwiri wa kijani au samawi.

examples.en: The rainbow lizard was sitting on the wall.
examples.sw: Mjusi wa rangi mbalimbali alikaa juu ya ukuta.

senses.definition_en: to grind corn into large particles
senses.definition_dg: Kusaga nafaka hadi ikale viryahi vikulu-vikulu.

examples.en: She ground the corn into large particles with a grinding stone.
examples.sw: Alisaga mahindi kwa jiwe la kusagia.

equivalents_en: make a rope using sisal fibres by rolling the fibres together

senses.definition_en: to make a rope using sisal fibres by rolling the fibres together
senses.definition_dg: Kutengeneza kamba kpwa kusundulia nyuzi za katani phamwenga.

examples.en: He made a nice rope by rolling sisal fibres together.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya phalaphala.

examples.dg: Phalephale ni neno ranjina ra phalaphala.
examples.en: Phalephale is another word for phalaphala (rainbow lizard).
examples.sw: Phalephale ni neno lingine la phalaphala.

equivalents_en: vertical pole used for making roof struts

senses.definition_en: vertical pole used for making roof struts
senses.definition_dg: Fito za kuimisha paa ra nyumba kpwa kunyooha.

examples.dg: Waika maphalu kutengeneza paa ra nyumba.
examples.en: He placed vertical poles to make the roof frame.
examples.sw: Aliweka pau kutengeneza paa la nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya phenya.

examples.dg: Phamba ni neno ranjina ra phenya.
examples.en: Phamba is another word for phenya (to enter).
examples.sw: Phamba ni neno lingine la phenya (kuingia).

equivalents_en: tune drums by tightening or loosening the cords that hold the

senses.definition_en: to tune drums by tightening or loosening the cords that hold the
senses.definition_dg: Kurekeza ngoma kpwa kukaza au kulegesha kamba zake.

examples.dg: Waganga anaphamba ngoma kabla ya kayamba.
examples.en: The healers are tuning the drums before the kayamba ceremony.
examples.sw: Waganga wanatengeneza ngoma kabla ya kayamba.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na mutu munjina phatu phwenga, pamoja.

examples.dg: Hukaleni phamwenga huno na hurye chakurya.
examples.en: Let us sit together here and eat food.
examples.sw: Tukae pamoja hapa na tule chakula.

equivalents_sw: make marks on an animal to indicate ownership; kutia alama juu ya ngozi za wanyama kuonyesha umilikaji

senses.definition_sw: to make marks on an animal to indicate ownership; kutia alama juu ya ngozi za wanyama kuonyesha umilikaji
senses.definition_dg: Kutiya alama ya moho kpwa ngozi ya nyama kuonyesa ni wa ani.

examples.dg: Waphana ng'ombe kpwa alama ya ukoo.
examples.en: He branded the cow with the clan's mark.
examples.sw: Alitia alama ng'ombe kwa nembo ya ukoo.

senses.definition_dg: Kubonyezana mikono wakati wa kulamusana.

examples.en: When they met they shook hands.

equivalents_en: the part of a coconut plant that develops to coconuts
equivalents_sw: sehemu ya mnazi ambayo hutowa nazi

senses.definition_en: the part of a coconut plant that develops to coconuts
senses.definition_sw: sehemu ya mnazi ambayo hutowa nazi
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mnazi ambayo inazala nazi.

examples.dg: Mnazi uhu una maphanda manji ya nazi.
examples.en: This coconut palm has many coconut-bearing branches.
examples.sw: Mnazi huu una matawi mengi ya nazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kutiya mbegu au mimea ardhini ili imeye.

examples.en: Father is planting corn in the farm.

senses.definition_dg: Chisu kikulu cha kukatira nyasi au kuni.

examples.dg: Mila ya kpwehu, mwana mlume achivyalwa, bada ya wiki nkutuluzwa kondze, nkuonyeswa jembe, uha na phanga
examples.en: A custom of ours is that, when a baby boy is born, after one week he is taken outside and shown a hoe, a bow and a machete
examples.sw: Desturi yetu, mtoto wa kiume akizaliwa huonyeshwa jembe, upinde na panga.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphangusa uchafu kula kpwa chitu kpwa mkono au nguo.

examples.dg: Phangusa meza kabla ya kuika chakurya.
examples.en: Wipe the table before putting food on it.
examples.sw: Pangusa meza kabla ya kuweka chakula.

senses.definition_dg: Hapa hapa, phatu hiphophi.

examples.en: The person was right here — very close.
examples.sw: Mtu alikuwa papa hapa — karibu sana.

equivalents_en: touch in order to feel the shape

senses.definition_en: to touch in order to feel the shape, to grope
senses.definition_dg: Kugusa-gusa chitu kpwa mikono ili kuonja sura yakpwe.

examples.dg: Waphaphasa ukuta kpwa kuona ni laini.
examples.en: He felt the wall to see if it is smooth.
examples.sw: Alipapasa ukuta kuona kama ni laini.

equivalents_en: there (near to both speaker and hearer)

senses.definition_en: there (near to both speaker and hearer)
senses.definition_dg: Phatu phaphephi na mutu anayegomba na anayesikira.

examples.en: There is where I saw the snake.

senses.definition_en: to attach, to put in position, to secure, to fix
senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu phatu phakpwe, kukifunga au kukisimamisha.

examples.dg: Kabla ya kulatsa, pharika muvwi lugbweni kpwandza
examples.en: Before releasing the arrow, fix it to the bowstring first
examples.sw: Kabla ya kupiga mshale, weka mshale kwenye kamba ya upinde kwanza.

senses.definition_en: to place or group objects together
senses.definition_dg: Kuika vitu phamwenga phatu phwenga.

examples.en: Group all the books together on the table.
examples.sw: Weka vitabu vyote pamoja kwenye meza.

senses.definition_dg: Moyo kupiga kpwa haraka kpwa sababu ya woga au kuzola.

examples.dg: Moyo wangu unaphatsuka bada ya kuzola.
examples.en: My heart is beating fast after running.
examples.sw: Moyo wangu unahema baada ya kukimbia.

equivalents_sw: hali ya ukware hasa kwa wasichana

senses.definition_en: to be precocious, particularly relating to sexual matters
senses.definition_sw: hali ya ukware hasa kwa wasichana

examples.en: That young girl is very precocious in sexual matters.
examples.sw: Msichana yule ana tabia za ukware.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphephetera nafaka ili kuusa makumbi na uchafu.

examples.en: Mother is winnowing rice with a basket.

senses.definition_dg: Diya kutoa sauti kulu ya kubweka.

examples.en: The dog is barking all night.

senses.definition_en: to be on heat (used of a male goat)
senses.definition_sw: hali ya beberu kulia wakati wa harusi
senses.definition_dg: Beberu kukala na hamu ya kuzala, kukala kpwa wakati wa kuzala.

examples.en: The male goat is on heat; it wants the female goat.

senses.definition_en: to stir up, to whisk, to drill or bore a hole
senses.definition_dg: Kuchanganya chitu kpwa kuchikikoroga, au kuchimba tundu kpwa kuzungusha.

examples.en: Stir the porridge so it doesn't burn.

equivalents_en: large basket for drying grains etc

senses.definition_en: large basket for drying grains etc
senses.definition_dg: Lungo kulu ya kuanisira nafaka dzulu ya dzuwa.

examples.en: He put grain in the large basket to dry it.
examples.sw: Aliweka nafaka kwenye uteo mkubwa kukaushia.

senses.definition_en: to look all around, to search intently
senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya kosi kosi kpwa kutafuta chitu.

examples.dg: Waphelephesa hiku na hiku, na ariphoona takuna mutu, wamuolaga
examples.en: He looked at all directions, and when he saw that there was nobody around, he killed him
examples.sw: Aliangalia huku na huko, na alipoona hakuna mtu, alimuua.

equivalents_sw: especially the gap of a missing tooth; pengo

senses.definition_sw: especially the gap of a missing tooth; pengo

senses.definition_dg: Kufungula chitu chirichofunikwa.

examples.en: Uncover the pot and check the stew.

senses.definition_dg: Kuinjira ndani ya nyumba au phatu.

examples.en: Enter inside the house.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya phokera.

examples.dg: Phepha ni neno ranjina ra phokera.
examples.en: Phepha is another word for phokera (to receive).
examples.sw: Phepha ni neno lingine la phokera (kupokea).

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya sisimizi adide.

examples.dg: Kuna maphepha manji kpwenye sukari iyo.
examples.en: There are many small ants in that sugar.
examples.sw: Kuna sisimizi wengi kwenye sukari hiyo.

equivalents_sw: kuwa nyonge kwa sababu ya njaa

senses.definition_en: to feel faint or weak from hunger
senses.definition_sw: kuwa nyonge kwa sababu ya njaa
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na uchovu na unyofu mwirini kpwa sababu ya njala.

examples.dg: Naphepheheka kpwa sababu sikarya tangu ligundzu.
examples.en: I feel faint because I haven't eaten since morning.
examples.sw: Ninahisi unyonge kwa sababu sijakula tangu asubuhi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphephetera nafaka ili kuusa uchafu.

examples.en: Mother is winnowing rice.

senses.definition_en: to fan something, e.g. a fire
senses.definition_dg: Kupiga phepho kpwa chitu dza moho ili uwake vizuri.

examples.en: Fan the fire with a winnowing basket.

senses.definition_en: to fly away in the wind, to be blown around by the wind
senses.definition_dg: Kuhehewa ni phepho na kutsupishwa hewa.

examples.dg: Makodza ganaphepheruka kpwa sababu ya phepho
examples.en: The leaves are blowing around because of the wind
examples.sw: Majani yanapeperuka kwa sababu ya upepo.

sub_entries.definition_en: blow away, usually used of the wind

examples.en: A light book

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phaphephi, si kure.

examples.dg: Duka ri phephi na nyumba yehu.
examples.en: The shop is near our house.
examples.sw: Duka liko karibu na nyumba yetu.

senses.definition_dg: Hewa inayopiga kpwa nguvu.

examples.en: A strong wind is blowing

senses.definition_dg: Kukala ukamala kukula, kukala mtu mzima kabisa.

examples.dg: Mwanache iye akaphera; ni mutu mzima.
examples.en: That young person has fully grown; he is an adult.
examples.sw: Kijana yule amepevuka; ni mtu mzima.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphyera nyumba au phatu kpwa liphyero.

examples.en: Sweep the house before the guests come.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha wazi, bila kufunikwa.

examples.en: The children are playing in the open.

senses.definition_dg: Kurehera chitu phephi au mchetu ariye na mimba kukala phephi na kuvyala.

examples.en: That woman is near her due date; she will give birth soon.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kukaribisha, piya linatumika kutaja mwanamke mzito ambaye wakati wake wa kuzalia ni karibu

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuuza, sawa na 'gani'.

examples.en: What is this you are doing?

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuuza phatu, sawa na 'wapi'.

examples.en: Where are you going?

senses.definition_dg: Kuzuwia mutu au chitu kisitsupe.

examples.en: Block the path so the goat doesn't pass through.

equivalents_en: bend or become distorted as a result of aging or prolonged pressure

senses.definition_en: to bend or become distorted as a result of aging or prolonged pressure
senses.definition_dg: Kupindika kpwa sababu ya umri au kusindwa ni nguvu.

examples.en: This tree bent from the wind.

senses.definition_dg: Kukaza uzi wa upinde.

examples.en: Tighten the bow before shooting.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphyera nyumba au phatu kpwa liphyero. Sawa na phera.

examples.dg: Phireya chumba chako kabla ya kulala.
examples.en: Sweep your room before sleeping.
examples.sw: Fagia chumba chako kabla ya kulala.

senses.definition_dg: Nambari ya phiri, bada ya ya kpwandza.

examples.dg: Hiri ni duka ra phiri ambaro ninaenda.
examples.en: This is the second shop that I am going to.
examples.sw: Hili ni duka la pili ninaloenda.

senses.definition_en: to send, to take something to a place
senses.definition_dg: Kutsukulira chitu phatu phanjina. Kupeleka.

examples.en: Take that letter to the teacher.

senses.definition_dg: Kuendesha gari au baiskeli.

examples.en: He knows how to drive a car well.

senses.definition_dg: Kupheya mutu na kumrecha atsupe. Kuphiya kando.

examples.dg: Phisa njira, mutu mkulu analonda kutsupa.
examples.en: Give way, an elder wants to pass.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa phatu au wakati.

examples.en: There at that place is where I saw it.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa basi, sambi.

examples.dg: Pho kpwani ni ani ndiyeaza kukuhendani mai ichikala wakati wosi mna chadi cha kuhenda manono?
examples.en: Now, who will want to harm you if you are always eager to do good?

senses.definition_dg: Kupokera chitu au mutu.

examples.en: He received a letter from the teacher.

senses.definition_dg: Kupokera chitu au kukaribisha mutu.

examples.en: They welcomed the guests with joy.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya phunga mrenje.

examples.dg: Phokeza ni neno rinaelezera hali ya kuphunga mrenje.
examples.en: Phokeza refers to phunga mrenje.
examples.sw: Phokeza inaelezea hali ya phunga mrenje.

senses.definition_en: to hand over, to pay wages
senses.definition_dg: Kupha mutu chitu kpwa mkono, au kuripha mshahara.

examples.en: The boss handed over their wages to the people.

examples.dg: Kala anaimba mazuma kuphokezana na yuya ariyekala dibwani
examples.en: He was singing in turns, taking turns with with whoever was in the pit

senses.definition_dg: Kupona kula kpwa ugonjwa. Kuwa mzima tsona.

examples.en: After the medicine, he healed quickly.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala mutu asiye na achili nyinji. Kupumbaa.

examples.en: Don't be foolish; use your mind.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyuni mkulu ariye na mdomo mure na mkulu.

examples.dg: Pholophondo ni nyuni mkulu ariye na mdomo wa ajabu.
examples.en: The hornbill is a large bird with a remarkable beak.
examples.sw: Polopondo ni ndege mkubwa aliye na mdomo wa ajabu.

senses.definition_en: to pound (esp. maize in a mortar)
senses.definition_dg: Kutwanga chitu kpwa kinu, hasa mahindi.

examples.en: Mother is pounding maize in the mortar.

senses.definition_en: to be weak after a disease
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na unyofu wa mwiri bada ya ugonjwa, kukala bila nguvu.

examples.en: He is still weak after the illness.
examples.sw: Bado ni mnyonge baada ya ugonjwa.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala kupindika, kukala si kunyooha.

examples.en: That stick is crooked.

equivalents_en: one side of the chest of a bird or chicken

senses.definition_en: one side of the chest of a bird or chicken
senses.definition_dg: Uphande mmwenga wa kidari cha kuku.

examples.en: Give me one side of the chicken's breast.

equivalents_sw: pono; aina ya samaki ambaye mara nyingi ana usingizi

senses.definition_en: kind of fish, often found in a torpid (sleepy) state
senses.definition_sw: pono; aina ya samaki ambaye mara nyingi ana usingizi
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki ambaye mara nyinji anapatikana akala atalala.

examples.dg: Phono ni samaki ambaye kagaluki sana.
examples.en: Phono is a fish that is often found in a sleepy state.
examples.sw: Phono ni samaki ambaye mara nyingi anasinzia.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phophosi, phatu phosiphosi.

examples.en: Go anywhere; there is no specific place.

senses.definition_dg: Dziwe jepesi rinatoka kpwa volkeno.

examples.en: Pumice stone is used for scrubbing skin.
examples.sw: Jiwe la volkeno hutumika kusugua ngozi.

senses.definition_dg: Kupha kuku chakurya.

examples.dg: Mama anaphosa kuku ligundzu na dziloni.
examples.en: Mother feeds the chickens in the morning and evening.
examples.sw: Mama analisha kuku asubuhi na jioni.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phosi, kosi-kosi.

examples.en: He knows people everywhere he goes.

senses.definition_dg: Tsini, kpwa ardhi.

examples.en: Put this bag down on the ground.

equivalents_en: send greetings to someone who is not present

senses.definition_en: to send greetings to someone who is not present
senses.definition_dg: Kutumiya mutu amulamusire mutu ambaye kapho.

examples.en: Send my greetings to mother.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu cha moho chikale cha baridi. Piya ni kuphoza mutu ugonjwa.

examples.en: Cool the tea before drinking.

senses.definition_dg: Kuterya mutu aphole kula kpwa ugonjwa.

examples.dg: Dawa iyo inamuphoza mutu ariye na homa.
examples.en: That medicine heals a person who has a fever.
examples.sw: Dawa hiyo inaponya mtu aliye na homa.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoa nafaka kpwa gunzi, dza mahindi kula kpwa chitswa chake.

examples.en: She shelled the corn from the cob.

senses.definition_dg: Kukuna makodza kula kpwa muhi.

examples.en: Pluck the leaves of this tree.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoya hewa ndani na kuitoa, kupumua.

examples.en: Breathe well, don't be anxious.

senses.definition_en: to listen intently, to pay attention
senses.definition_dg: Kusikira kpwa makini sana, kuika sikiro.

examples.en: Listen carefully to what the teacher is saying.

equivalents_en: be pleasing or entertaining (used of words or conversation)
equivalents_sw: kuvutia au kufurahisha hasa maneno au mazungumzo

senses.definition_en: to be pleasing or entertaining (used of words or conversation)
senses.definition_sw: kuvutia au kufurahisha hasa maneno au mazungumzo
senses.definition_dg: Maneno au mazungumzo kukala ga kupendeza na kufurahisha.

examples.dg: Dzana nábisha na msena wangu, na manenoge ganiphunga sana
examples.en: Yesterday I chatted with my friend, and his words pleased me a lot
examples.sw: Jana nilizungumza na rafiki yangu, na maneno yake yalinifurahisha sana.

sub_entries.definition_en: kuphunga afternoon sun, i.e. not too hot
sub_entries.definition_sw: jua la jioni sio kali sana

equivalents_en: perform a traditional dance (kayamba) to appease evil spirits (pepho)

senses.definition_en: to perform a traditional dance (kayamba) to appease evil spirits (pepho)
senses.definition_dg: Kucheza ngoma ya kayamba ili kutuliza pepo mbii.

examples.en: People are performing the kayamba ceremony at night.

senses.definition_en: mrenje to be foolish, slow, or otherwise not normal
senses.definition_dg: Maneno au mazungumzo kukala ga kupendeza na kufurahisha.

examples.dg: Dzana nábisha na msena wangu, na manenoge ganiphunga sana.
examples.en: Yesterday I chatted with my friend, and his words were very entertaining.
examples.sw: Jana nilizungumza na rafiki yangu, na maneno yake yalinifurahisha sana.

senses.definition_en: pima koma, pholoka, phupha, shaha, viya)
senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaelezera aina mbali-mbali za kupumbaa au kuvia.

examples.dg: Phungo ni neno ra kisarufi rinatumiwa kpwa aina mbali-mbali.
examples.en: Phungo is a grammatical term used for various types.
examples.sw: Phungo ni neno la kisarufi linalotumika kwa aina mbalimbali.

senses.definition_dg: Tawi ra muhi renye makodza.

examples.dg: Wahala phungo ra muhi kpwa kufunika nyumba.
examples.en: He took a leafy branch to cover the house.
examples.sw: Alichukua tawi lenye majani kwa kufunika nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Kupunguka kpwa idadi au upana.

examples.en: The water has decreased in the river.

senses.definition_dg: Bahari kupwa na madzi kuphiya nyuma.

examples.dg: Bahari ikaphunguka; ni wakati wa kupwa.
examples.en: The tide has gone out; it is ebb tide.
examples.sw: Bahari imepwa; ni wakati wa kupwa.

examples.en: There was no-one who lacked anything

senses.definition_en: to decrease, to shrink, to become smaller
senses.definition_dg: Kukala kidogo zaidi kuriko buda, kupungua.

examples.en: The price of food has decreased a little.

senses.definition_en: to be a fool, to be mentally retarded
senses.definition_dg: Kukala mutu asiye na achili za kawaida.

examples.dg: Msikubali kuchengbwa ni mutu na maneno ga kuphupha
examples.en: Do not let anyone deceive you with foolish words
examples.sw: Msikubali kudanganywa na mtu na maneno ya upumbavu.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga mutu kpwa kamba au fimbo.

examples.en: The teacher whipped the student with a stick.

senses.definition_en: to lose weight, to shrink, to reduce in size
senses.definition_dg: Kupunguka kpwa mwiri, kukonda.

examples.en: After the illness, he lost a lot of weight.

senses.definition_en: to burn up, to burn down (buildings), to be burnt (food)
senses.definition_dg: Moho kurya chitu na kukihasiri, kuunguzwa.

examples.en: The house has burnt down

senses.definition_dg: Moho kurya chitu na kukihasiri, kuunguzwa.

examples.en: The house burned down.

senses.definition_dg: Kukata nyasi au mimea kpwa phanga.

examples.en: He slashed the grass in the farm.

senses.definition_en: to make fresh meat dry, with or without cooking oil
senses.definition_dg: Kukausha nyama mbisi kpwa moho au dzuwa.

examples.en: Mother dried the fresh meat so it would be preserved.

senses.definition_dg: Kufagia phatu kpwa liphyero. Sawa na phera.

examples.en: Sweep the field before the game.

senses.definition_en: to squeeze through a small gap, e.g. to pass in between people who
senses.definition_dg: Kutsupira phatu phembamba kahi ya atu au vitu.

examples.dg: Waphyurira kahi ya atu na kutsupa.
examples.en: He squeezed through between the people and passed.
examples.sw: Alipitia kati ya watu na kupita.

sub_entries.definition_en: close together, to enter a thicket
